calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-19-2002 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-19-2002 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: Assigned to Department 210 for prov-up. Plaintiff appears by Sandra Mitchell, with counsel, John Zanghi. No appearance by or for defendant. The following Plaintiff's Exhibits are admitted in evidence: 1. Management Agreement; 2. Owner's certification to HUD; 3. Lease Agreement; 4. 10-day Notice. Sandra Mitchell is sworn and examined on plaintiff's behalf. Following a brief recess, plaintiff's counsel requests that this case go off calendar. Counsel to file a Request for Dismissal, Without Prejudice.

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-08-2002 Continued To Feb-19-02 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2002 Off Calendar
